title: Two Sum (0-based indices)
statement_md:
# Two Sum

Given an array of integers and a target, return two 0-based indices i j such that a[i] + a[j] = target.

Input:
- n
- n integers
- target

Output:
- i j

Assume exactly one solution exists.

title: Valid Parentheses
statement_md:
# Valid Parentheses

Given a string consisting of ()[]{} determine if it is valid.

Output YES if valid else NO.

title: Fibonacci Mod
statement_md:
# Fibonacci Mod

Compute F(n) mod 1,000,000,007 where F(0)=0, F(1)=1.

Input: n
Output: F(n) mod 1e9+7

title: Shortest Path (Unweighted Graph)
statement_md:
# Shortest Path (Unweighted)

Given an undirected unweighted graph, find the shortest distance from s to t.

Input:
- n m
- m lines: u v (0-based)
- s t

Output:
- shortest distance (number of edges) or -1 if unreachable

title: LCS Length
statement_md:
# LCS Length

Given two strings a and b, output the length of their longest common subsequence.

Input:
- a
- b

Output:
- integer length
